magic_items.name: Potion of Healing
magic_items.desc: Regain 2d4+2 hit points when you drink this potion.

magic_items.name: Potion of Greater Healing
magic_items.desc: Regain 4d4+4 hit points when you drink this potion.

magic_items.name: Potion of Superior Healing
magic_items.desc: Regain 8d4+8 hit points when you drink this potion.

magic_items.name: Potion of Supreme Healing
magic_items.desc: Regain 10d4+20 hit points when you drink this potion.

magic_items.name: Potion of Climbing
magic_items.desc: Gain a climbing speed equal to your walking speed for 1 hour.

magic_items.name: Potion of Animal Friendship
magic_items.desc: Cast animal friendship (save DC 13) for 1 hour after drinking.

magic_items.name: Potion of Clairvoyance
magic_items.desc: Cast clairvoyance when you drink this potion.

magic_items.name: Potion of Diminution
magic_items.desc: You become reduced in size (as the reduce portion of enlarge/reduce) for 1d4 hours.

magic_items.name: Potion of Flying
magic_items.desc: Gain a flying speed of 60 feet for 1 hour.

magic_items.name: Potion of Gaseous Form
magic_items.desc: You gain the effects of the gaseous form spell for up to 1 hour (concentration).

magic_items.name: Potion of Giant Strength (Hill)
magic_items.desc: Your Strength score becomes 21 for 1 hour (has no effect if already 21 or higher).

magic_items.name: Potion of Giant Strength (Stone)
magic_items.desc: Your Strength score becomes 23 for 1 hour.

magic_items.name: Potion of Giant Strength (Frost)
magic_items.desc: Your Strength score becomes 23 for 1 hour.

magic_items.name: Potion of Giant Strength (Fire)
magic_items.desc: Your Strength score becomes 25 for 1 hour.

magic_items.name: Potion of Giant Strength (Cloud)
magic_items.desc: Your Strength score becomes 27 for 1 hour.

magic_items.name: Potion of Giant Strength (Storm)
magic_items.desc: Your Strength score becomes 29 for 1 hour.

magic_items.name: Potion of Heroism
magic_items.desc: Gain 10 temporary hit points and become immune to the frightened condition for 1 hour.

magic_items.name: Potion of Invisibility
magic_items.desc: Become invisible for 1 hour. The effect ends early if you attack or cast a spell.

magic_items.name: Potion of Mind Reading
magic_items.desc: Cast detect thoughts (save DC 13) for 1 minute when you drink this potion.

magic_items.name: Potion of Poison
magic_items.desc: Disguised as a healing potion. On drinking: 3d6 poison damage (DC 13 CON halves) and poisoned for 24 hours.

magic_items.name: Potion of Resistance
magic_items.desc: Gain resistance to one type of damage for 1 hour (type determined when the potion is created).

magic_items.name: Potion of Speed
magic_items.desc: Gain the effects of the haste spell for 1 minute (no concentration required).

magic_items.name: Potion of Water Breathing
magic_items.desc: Breathe underwater for 1 hour after drinking this potion.

magic_items.name: Ammunition, +1
magic_items.desc: You have a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this piece of magic ammunition.

magic_items.name: Ammunition, +2
magic_items.desc: You have a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this piece of magic ammunition.

magic_items.name: Ammunition, +3
magic_items.desc: You have a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this piece of magic ammunition.

magic_items.name: Weapon, +1
magic_items.desc: You have a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.

magic_items.name: Weapon, +2
magic_items.desc: You have a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.

magic_items.name: Weapon, +3
magic_items.desc: You have a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.

magic_items.name: Berserker Axe
magic_items.desc: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you roll a 1 on an attack roll with this weapon, you must succeed on a DC 15 WIS save or go berserk, attacking the nearest creature.

magic_items.name: Dancing Sword
magic_items.desc: As a bonus action, throw the sword into the air to animate it. It flies up to 30 ft and attacks on your initiative for up to 4 rounds, then returns.

magic_items.name: Defender
magic_items.desc: You gain a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls. The first time you attack each turn, you can transfer some or all of the bonus to your AC instead.

magic_items.name: Dragon Slayer
magic_items.desc: Deal an extra 3d6 damage to dragons on a hit.

magic_items.name: Dwarven Thrower
magic_items.desc: +3 warhammer. Thrown property (range 20/60). Reappears in your hand when thrown. Deals extra 1d8 on hit (2d8 vs. giants).

magic_items.name: Flame Tongue
magic_items.desc: Speak a command word to ignite the blade. Deals extra 2d6 fire damage. Sheds bright light 40 ft, dim light 40 ft beyond that.

magic_items.name: Frost Brand
magic_items.desc: Deals extra 1d6 cold damage. You have resistance to fire damage while holding it. When drawn in sub-freezing temperatures, extinguishes non-magical flames within 30 ft.

magic_items.name: Giant Slayer
magic_items.desc: Deal an extra 2d6 damage to giants. Targets must also make DC 15 STR saving throw or fall prone.

magic_items.name: Holy Avenger
magic_items.desc: +3 to attack and damage. On a hit against fiends or undead, deal extra 2d10 radiant damage. Allies within 10 ft have advantage on saving throws against spells and magical effects.

magic_items.name: Javelin of Lightning
magic_items.desc: Once per dawn: throw to release a lightning bolt 5 ft wide and 120 ft long, dealing 4d6 lightning damage to all in the line (DEX DC 13 halves).

magic_items.name: Luck Blade
magic_items.desc: Once per day, reroll any attack roll, ability check, or saving throw, taking either result. Contains 1d3 wishes.

magic_items.name: Mace of Disruption
magic_items.desc: Deals 3d6 extra radiant damage to fiends and undead. If a fiend or undead has 25 or fewer HP after the hit, it must make DC 15 WIS save or be destroyed.

magic_items.name: Mace of Smiting
magic_items.desc: +1 to attack and damage. Deals extra 2d6 against constructs. On a roll of 20 vs. a construct, deal an additional 2d6 damage.

magic_items.name: Mace of Terror
magic_items.desc: 3 charges (recharge 1d3 at dawn). Expend 1 charge: creatures within 30 ft must make DC 15 WIS save or become frightened for 1 minute.

magic_items.name: Nine Lives Stealer
magic_items.desc: +2 to attack and damage. On a hit: if the target has 4 or fewer HP, it must make DC 15 CON save or be slain outright (up to 9 uses).

magic_items.name: Oathbow
magic_items.desc: Swear enmity against a target. Advantage on attacks against that target; disadvantage on attacks against others while it lives.

magic_items.name: Scimitar of Speed
magic_items.desc: +2 to attack and damage. Make one attack with the scimitar as a bonus action each round.

magic_items.name: Sun Blade
magic_items.desc: +2 longsword dealing radiant instead of slashing damage. Extra 1d8 damage to undead. Emits daylight on command (30 ft bright, 30 ft dim).

magic_items.name: Sword of Life Stealing
magic_items.desc: On a roll of 20 against a creature that is not a construct or undead, you gain 10 temporary hit points.

magic_items.name: Sword of Sharpness
magic_items.desc: On a roll of 20, maximize the weapon's damage dice and roll an extra 1d10 slashing damage. On a 20 vs. a humanoid, sever a limb.

magic_items.name: Sword of Wounding
magic_items.desc: On a hit: target loses 1d4 HP at the start of each of its turns (DC 15 CON to stop). The wound prevents regaining HP until the save succeeds.

magic_items.name: Trident of Fish Command
magic_items.desc: 3 charges (recharge 1d3 at dawn). Expend 1 charge to cast dominate beast on fish and other underwater creatures.

magic_items.name: Vicious Weapon
magic_items.desc: On a roll of 20 with this magic weapon, the target takes an extra 2d6 damage of the weapon's type.

magic_items.name: Vorpal Sword
magic_items.desc: +3 to attack and damage. Ignores resistance to slashing damage. On a roll of 20 against a Large or smaller creature with a head, the target is decapitated.

magic_items.name: Weapon of Warning
magic_items.desc: You and your companions can't be surprised while attuned. You and companions within 30 ft have advantage on initiative rolls.

magic_items.name: Armor, +1
magic_items.desc: You have a +1 bonus to AC while wearing this armor.

magic_items.name: Armor, +2
magic_items.desc: You have a +2 bonus to AC while wearing this armor.

magic_items.name: Armor, +3
magic_items.desc: You have a +3 bonus to AC while wearing this armor.

magic_items.name: Adamantine Armor
magic_items.desc: Critical hits against you become normal hits while wearing this armor.

magic_items.name: Mithral Armor
magic_items.desc: This armor has no disadvantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks and no minimum Strength requirement.

magic_items.name: Armor of Resistance
magic_items.desc: You have resistance to one type of damage while wearing this armor (determined when the armor is created).

magic_items.name: Elven Chain
magic_items.desc: A fine chain shirt with no stealth disadvantage. You are considered proficient with it even if you lack proficiency with medium armor.

magic_items.name: Shield, +1
magic_items.desc: While holding this shield, you have a +1 bonus to AC. This bonus is in addition to the shield's normal bonus to AC.

magic_items.name: Shield, +2
magic_items.desc: While holding this shield, you have a +2 bonus to AC in addition to the shield's normal bonus.

magic_items.name: Shield, +3
magic_items.desc: While holding this shield, you have a +3 bonus to AC in addition to the shield's normal bonus.

magic_items.name: Animated Shield
magic_items.desc: As a bonus action, speak the command word to cause the shield to animate, wield itself, and protect you for 1 minute (1/day). Both your hands are free while it animates.

magic_items.name: Sentinel Shield
magic_items.desc: While holding this shield, you have advantage on initiative rolls and Wisdom (Perception) checks.

magic_items.name: Amulet of Health
magic_items.desc: Your Constitution score is 19 while you wear this amulet. It has no effect if your Constitution is already 19 or higher.

magic_items.name: Amulet of Proof Against Detection
magic_items.desc: While wearing this amulet, you are hidden from divination magic. You can't be targeted by such magic or perceived through magical scrying sensors.

magic_items.name: Bag of Holding
magic_items.desc: This bag's interior space is larger than its outside dimensions. It can hold up to 500 pounds, not exceeding a volume of 64 cubic feet. The bag always weighs 15 pounds.

magic_items.name: Boots of Elvenkind
magic_items.desc: While you wear these boots, your steps make no sound, regardless of the surface. You have advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to move silently.

magic_items.name: Boots of Speed
magic_items.desc: As a bonus action, click the heels to double your walking speed and make opportunity attacks have disadvantage against you, for up to 10 minutes total (1/day).

magic_items.name: Bracers of Archery
magic_items.desc: You gain proficiency with the longbow and shortbow and a +2 bonus to damage rolls on ranged attacks made with such weapons.

magic_items.name: Bracers of Defense
magic_items.desc: While wearing these bracers, you gain a +2 bonus to AC if you are wearing no armor and using no shield.

magic_items.name: Brooch of Shielding
magic_items.desc: While wearing this brooch, you are immune to damage from the magic missile spell and have resistance to damage from force spells.

magic_items.name: Cape of the Mountebank
magic_items.desc: While wearing this cape, you can use it to cast the dimension door spell as an action. This property recharges daily at dawn.

magic_items.name: Cloak of Displacement
magic_items.desc: While wearing this cloak, it projects an illusion that makes you appear elsewhere. Attack rolls against you have disadvantage. The property ceases if you take damage until the start of your next turn.

magic_items.name: Cloak of Elvenkind
magic_items.desc: While wearing this cloak with the hood up, Wisdom (Perception) checks made to see you have disadvantage, and you have advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks.

magic_items.name: Cloak of Protection
magic_items.desc: You gain a +1 bonus to AC and saving throws while you wear this cloak.

magic_items.name: Cloak of the Bat
magic_items.desc: While wearing this cloak you have advantage on Stealth checks in darkness. By spending 1 minute attaching it, you can transform into a bat for 1 hour per day.

magic_items.name: Crystal Ball
magic_items.desc: As an action, cast scrying (DC 17) for up to 1 hour. The ball has 3 charges and regains 1d3 charges daily at dawn.

magic_items.name: Decanter of Endless Water
magic_items.desc: Remove the stopper and speak a command word to produce fresh or salt water (stream, fountain, or geyser mode, each producing different amounts).

magic_items.name: Deck of Many Things
magic_items.desc: Draw cards from this deck for powerful and often chaotic effects. Each card has a unique magical consequence that can bless or curse the drawer.

magic_items.name: Dimensional Shackles
magic_items.desc: Place on an incapacitated creature to prevent it from using any method of extradimensional movement (teleportation, plane shifting, etc.).

magic_items.name: Dust of Disappearance
magic_items.desc: When sprinkled on yourself, you become invisible for 2d4 minutes. Anything you wear or carry is also invisible.

magic_items.name: Efreeti Bottle
magic_items.desc: Uncork as an action to release an efreeti. A 1-in-4 chance the efreeti serves you for 1,001 days; otherwise it either grants 3 wishes or attacks.

magic_items.name: Gauntlets of Ogre Power
magic_items.desc: Your Strength score is 19 while you wear these gauntlets. They have no effect if your Strength is already 19 or higher.

magic_items.name: Gem of Seeing
magic_items.desc: 3 charges (recharge 1d3 at dawn). Use 1 charge to see invisible and ethereal creatures for 10 minutes.

magic_items.name: Goggles of Night
magic_items.desc: While wearing these dark lenses, you have darkvision out to 60 feet. If you already have darkvision, wearing the goggles increases its range by 60 feet.

magic_items.name: Hat of Disguise
magic_items.desc: While wearing this hat, you can cast the disguise self spell at will as an action.

magic_items.name: Headband of Intellect
magic_items.desc: Your Intelligence score is 19 while you wear this headband. It has no effect if your Intelligence is already 19 or higher.

magic_items.name: Helm of Comprehending Languages
magic_items.desc: While wearing this helm, you can understand all spoken and written languages.

magic_items.name: Helm of Telepathy
magic_items.desc: While wearing this helm, you can use an action to cast detect thoughts (DC 13) at will. You can also send telepathic messages to creatures within 30 feet.

magic_items.name: Helm of Teleportation
magic_items.desc: 3 charges (recharge 1d3 at dawn). Expend 1 charge to cast the teleport spell.

magic_items.name: Heward's Handy Haversack
magic_items.desc: This backpack has three compartments: two side compartments each hold 20 cubic feet, one central compartment holds 8 cubic feet. It always weighs 5 pounds.

magic_items.name: Horn of Blasting
magic_items.desc: As an action, blast a 30-foot cone: 5d6 thunder damage (CON DC 15 halves) and deafened for 1 minute. 1-in-20 chance the horn explodes.

magic_items.name: Immovable Rod
magic_items.desc: Press the button to fix the rod in place, immune to gravity, holding up to 8,000 pounds. DC 30 STR check to move it.

magic_items.name: Iron Bands of Bilarro
magic_items.desc: Throw at a creature within 60 ft. On a hit, a Huge or smaller creature is restrained. A DC 20 STR check (action) breaks the bands.

magic_items.name: Iron Flask
magic_items.desc: As an action, point at an extraplanar creature within 60 ft (DC 17 WIS save). On failure it is trapped in the flask. Speak the command word to release it and use it as a servant for 1 hour.

magic_items.name: Lantern of Revealing
magic_items.desc: While lit, this lantern makes invisible creatures and objects visible within 30 feet.

magic_items.name: Mantle of Spell Resistance
magic_items.desc: You have advantage on saving throws against spells while wearing this mantle.

magic_items.name: Manual of Bodily Health
magic_items.desc: Reading this tome increases your Constitution score and maximum by 2. The book then becomes a mundane tome for 100 years.

magic_items.name: Manual of Gainful Exercise
magic_items.desc: Reading and following this tome increases your Strength score and maximum by 2. The book then becomes mundane for 100 years.

magic_items.name: Manual of Quickness of Action
magic_items.desc: Reading and following this tome increases your Dexterity score and maximum by 2. The book then becomes mundane for 100 years.

magic_items.name: Medallion of Thoughts
magic_items.desc: 3 charges (recharge 1d3 at dawn). Expend 1 charge to cast detect thoughts (DC 13).

magic_items.name: Mirror of Life Trapping
magic_items.desc: When a creature within 30 ft sees its reflection (DC 15 CHA save), it is trapped in one of 12 extradimensional cells. You can communicate with trapped creatures.

magic_items.name: Necklace of Adaptation
magic_items.desc: While wearing this necklace, you can breathe in any environment. You have advantage on saving throws against harmful gases and vapors.

magic_items.name: Necklace of Fireballs
magic_items.desc: Contains 1d6+3 beads. Detach and throw a bead up to 60 ft. It explodes in a fireball (save DC 15), dealing 2d6 fire damage per bead used.

magic_items.name: Periapt of Health
magic_items.desc: You are immune to contracting any disease while wearing this periapt. If you are already diseased, the effects are suppressed while you wear it.

magic_items.name: Periapt of Proof Against Poison
magic_items.desc: While wearing this pendant, you are immune to being poisoned and you have immunity to poison damage.

magic_items.name: Periapt of Wound Closure
magic_items.desc: While wearing this pendant, you stabilize at 0 HP. Double the number of HP you regain when spending Hit Dice during a short rest.

magic_items.name: Portable Hole
magic_items.desc: Unfold this piece of black cloth to create a circular extradimensional hole, 6 ft in diameter and 10 ft deep.

magic_items.name: Rope of Climbing
magic_items.desc: This 60-foot rope can animate and obey your commands. It can hold up to 3,000 pounds and knot or unknot itself on command.

magic_items.name: Rope of Entanglement
magic_items.desc: As an action, throw the rope at a Large or smaller creature within 20 ft. It must succeed on a DC 15 DEX or STR saving throw or become restrained.

magic_items.name: Scarab of Protection
magic_items.desc: You have immunity to spells that only affect undead. You have advantage on death saving throws. The scarab has 12 charges; expend 1 to succeed on a saving throw automatically.

magic_items.name: Sending Stones
magic_items.desc: A matched pair of stones. You can cast sending to communicate with the holder of the other stone (1/day per stone).

magic_items.name: Sphere of Annihilation
magic_items.desc: A 2-foot-diameter black sphere that destroys all matter it passes through. DC 13 Intelligence check to control it.

magic_items.name: Stone of Good Luck (Luckstone)
magic_items.desc: While this polished agate is on your person, you gain a +1 bonus to ability checks and saving throws.

magic_items.name: Winged Boots
magic_items.desc: While wearing these boots, you have a flying speed equal to your walking speed. You can use the boots to fly for up to 4 hours, all at once or in several shorter flights.

magic_items.name: Wings of Flying
magic_items.desc: While wearing this cloak, you can use an action to sprout a pair of bat or bird wings. You gain a flying speed of 60 feet for 1 hour (1/day).

magic_items.name: Ring of Animal Influence
magic_items.desc: 3 charges (recharge 1d3 at dawn). Cast animal friendship, fear (targeting only beasts), or speak with animals using a charge.

magic_items.name: Ring of Evasion
magic_items.desc: 3 charges (recharge 1d3 at dawn). When you fail a DEX saving throw, use your reaction and expend a charge to succeed instead.

magic_items.name: Ring of Feather Falling
magic_items.desc: When you fall while wearing this ring, you descend 60 feet per round and take no damage from falling.

magic_items.name: Ring of Free Action
magic_items.desc: While wearing this ring, difficult terrain doesn't cost extra movement. You can't be paralyzed or restrained.

magic_items.name: Ring of Invisibility
magic_items.desc: While wearing this ring, you can turn invisible as an action. You remain invisible until the ring is removed, or until you attack or cast a spell.

magic_items.name: Ring of Jumping
magic_items.desc: While wearing this ring, you can cast the jump spell from it as a bonus action at will.

magic_items.name: Ring of Mind Shielding
magic_items.desc: While wearing this ring, you are immune to magic that allows others to read your thoughts, determine whether you are lying, or know your alignment. If you die, your soul can enter the ring.

magic_items.name: Ring of Protection
magic_items.desc: You gain a +1 bonus to AC and saving throws while wearing this ring.

magic_items.name: Ring of Regeneration
magic_items.desc: While wearing this ring, you regain 1d6 HP every 10 minutes if you have at least 1 HP. Severed body members regrow after 1d6+1 days.

magic_items.name: Ring of Resistance
magic_items.desc: You have resistance to one damage type while wearing this ring (determined when the ring is created).

magic_items.name: Ring of Spell Storing
magic_items.desc: This ring stores up to 5 levels of spells cast into it. You can cast stored spells using the original caster's DC and attack bonus.

magic_items.name: Ring of Swimming
magic_items.desc: You have a swimming speed of 40 feet while wearing this ring.

magic_items.name: Ring of the Ram
magic_items.desc: 3 charges (recharge 1d3 at dawn). Expend 1–3 charges: ranged spell attack, deals 2d10 force damage per charge and pushes target 5 ft per charge.

magic_items.name: Ring of Three Wishes
magic_items.desc: 3 charges. While holding this ring, you can expend 1 charge to cast the wish spell. The ring becomes nonmagical when its last charge is used.

magic_items.name: Ring of Warmth
magic_items.desc: While wearing this ring, you have resistance to cold damage. The ring also keeps you comfortable in temperatures as low as −50 degrees Fahrenheit.

magic_items.name: Ring of Water Walking
magic_items.desc: While wearing this ring, you can stand on and move across any liquid surface as if it were solid ground.

magic_items.name: Ring of X-ray Vision
magic_items.desc: See through solid matter to a depth of 30 ft (1 ft of stone or 1 inch of metal blocks it). After using for 1+ hours, make a DC 15 CON save or suffer one level of exhaustion.

magic_items.name: Rod of Absorption
magic_items.desc: Absorb spell energy targeting only you (up to 50 levels total). Store absorbed levels to cast spells you know, using those levels.

magic_items.name: Rod of Alertness
magic_items.desc: Advantage on Perception checks and Initiative. As an action (1/day): cast detect evil and good, detect magic, detect poison and disease, and see invisibility simultaneously for 10 minutes.

magic_items.name: Rod of Lordly Might
magic_items.desc: Replaces a missing hand. Functions as a +3 mace. Has 6 buttons that activate different weapon forms or other powers.

magic_items.name: Rod of Rulership
magic_items.desc: 2 charges (recharge 1d2 at dawn). Expend 1 charge: creatures within 120 ft must make DC 15 WIS save or be charmed for 8 hours.

magic_items.name: Rod of Security
magic_items.desc: Transport up to 200 willing creatures to an extradimensional paradise. Time passes there normally; up to 200 days can be spent. 1/day recharge after returning.

magic_items.name: Rod of the Pact Keeper, +1
magic_items.desc: +1 to spell attack rolls and spell save DC. Regain one warlock spell slot once per day.

magic_items.name: Rod of the Pact Keeper, +2
magic_items.desc: +2 to spell attack rolls and spell save DC. Regain one warlock spell slot once per day.

magic_items.name: Rod of the Pact Keeper, +3
magic_items.desc: +3 to spell attack rolls and spell save DC. Regain one warlock spell slot once per day.

magic_items.name: Staff of Charming
magic_items.attunement: attunement by a bard, cleric, druid, sorcerer, warlock, or wizard
magic_items.desc: 10 charges (recharge 1d6+4 at dawn). Cast charm person (1 charge), command (1 charge), or comprehend languages (1 charge).

magic_items.name: Staff of Fire
magic_items.attunement: attunement by a druid, sorcerer, warlock, or wizard
magic_items.desc: 10 charges (recharge 1d6+4 at dawn). Cast burning hands (1 charge), fireball (3 charges), or wall of fire (4 charges).

magic_items.name: Staff of Frost
magic_items.attunement: attunement by a druid, sorcerer, warlock, or wizard
magic_items.desc: 10 charges (recharge 1d6+4 at dawn). Cast cone of cold (5 charges), fog cloud (1 charge), ice storm (4 charges), or wall of ice (4 charges).

magic_items.name: Staff of Healing
magic_items.attunement: attunement by a bard, cleric, or druid
magic_items.desc: 10 charges (recharge 1d6+4 at dawn). Cast cure wounds (1–6 charges), lesser restoration (2 charges), or mass cure wounds (5 charges).

magic_items.name: Staff of Power
magic_items.attunement: attunement by a sorcerer, warlock, or wizard
magic_items.desc: 20 charges (recharge 2d8+4 at dawn). +2 to attack and damage rolls. +2 AC and saving throws. Can cast cone of cold, fireball, globe of invulnerability, hold monster, levitate, lightning bolt, magic missile, ray of enfeeblement, and wall of force.

magic_items.name: Staff of Striking
magic_items.desc: 10 charges (recharge 1d6+4 at dawn). When you hit with the staff, expend 1–3 charges to deal extra 1d6 force damage per charge.

magic_items.name: Staff of Swarming Insects
magic_items.attunement: attunement by a bard, cleric, druid, shaman, warlock, or wizard
magic_items.desc: 10 charges (recharge 1d6+4 at dawn). Cast giant insect (4 charges) or insect plague (5 charges).

magic_items.name: Staff of the Magi
magic_items.attunement: attunement by a sorcerer, warlock, or wizard
magic_items.desc: 50 charges. Absorb spells targeting only you (regain 1 charge/spell level). +2 attack rolls and saving throws. Can cast 12 different spells. If destroyed, releases a retributive strike.

magic_items.name: Staff of the Woodlands
magic_items.desc: 10 charges (recharge 1d6+4 at dawn). Cast animal friendship (1 charge), awaken (5 charges), barkskin (2 charges), locate animals or plants (2 charges), speak with animals (1 charge), speak with plants (3 charges), or wall of thorns (6 charges).

magic_items.name: Staff of Thunder and Lightning
magic_items.desc: +2 to attack and damage. Once per day each: lightning bolt (6d6), thunder (60 ft, DEX DC 17 for 2d6), lightning stroke (5 ft wide 120 ft line, 9d6 lightning), thunderclap (10d6 lightning + 10d6 thunder combined).

magic_items.name: Staff of Withering
magic_items.attunement: attunement by a cleric, druid, or warlock
magic_items.desc: 3 charges (recharge 1d3 at dawn). On a hit, expend 1 charge: 10d6+40 necrotic damage and target makes DC 15 CON save or has disadvantage on STR and CON checks for 1 hour.

magic_items.name: Wand of Binding
magic_items.desc: 7 charges (recharge 1d6+1 at dawn). Cast hold monster (5 charges) or hold person (2 charges).

magic_items.name: Wand of Enemy Detection
magic_items.desc: 7 charges (recharge 1d6+1 at dawn). Expend 1 charge to know the direction of the nearest hostile creature within 60 ft for 1 minute.

magic_items.name: Wand of Fear
magic_items.desc: 7 charges (recharge 1d6+1 at dawn). As an action, expend 1 charge: creatures in a 60-ft cone make DC 15 WIS save or be frightened for 1 minute.

magic_items.name: Wand of Fireballs
magic_items.desc: 7 charges (recharge 1d6+1 at dawn). Cast fireball (DC 15) as a 3rd-level spell (1 charge); expend extra charges to cast at higher levels.

magic_items.name: Wand of Lightning Bolts
magic_items.desc: 7 charges (recharge 1d6+1 at dawn). Cast lightning bolt (DC 15) as a 3rd-level spell (1 charge); expend extra charges to cast at higher levels.

magic_items.name: Wand of Magic Detection
magic_items.desc: 3 charges (recharge 1d3 at dawn). Expend 1 charge to cast detect magic.

magic_items.name: Wand of Magic Missiles
magic_items.desc: 7 charges (recharge 1d6+1 at dawn). Cast magic missile as a 1st-level spell (1 charge); expend extra charges to cast at higher levels.

magic_items.name: Wand of Paralysis
magic_items.desc: 7 charges (recharge 1d6+1 at dawn). As an action: target within 60 ft makes DC 15 CON save or is paralyzed until end of its next turn.

magic_items.name: Wand of Polymorph
magic_items.desc: 7 charges (recharge 1d6+1 at dawn). Cast polymorph (DC 15) using 1 charge.

magic_items.name: Wand of Secrets
magic_items.desc: 3 charges (recharge 1d3 at dawn). The wand pulses when within 30 ft of a hidden door or trap. Expend 1 charge to reveal it.

magic_items.name: Wand of the War Mage, +1
magic_items.desc: +1 to spell attack rolls. Ignore half cover on your spell attacks.

magic_items.name: Wand of the War Mage, +2
magic_items.desc: +2 to spell attack rolls. Ignore half cover on your spell attacks.

magic_items.name: Wand of the War Mage, +3
magic_items.desc: +3 to spell attack rolls. Ignore half cover on your spell attacks.

magic_items.name: Wand of Web
magic_items.desc: 7 charges (recharge 1d6+1 at dawn). Cast web (DC 15) using 1 charge.

magic_items.name: Wand of Wonder
magic_items.desc: 7 charges (recharge 1d6+1 at dawn). Expend 1 charge to produce a random magical effect from a d100 table of wild outcomes.
